verdict_reason: New address sections are govuk-conformant, accessible (aria-describedby, h2 legends), autoescaped, and correctly wired to controller-supplied selected* variables; only a minor content-style nit.

todos.issue: Warning text 'Providing a false address is an act of fraud' is a complete sentence but dropped its trailing full stop when moved (was 'an act of fraud.').
todos.fix: Restore the full stop: 'Providing a false address is an act of fraud.'
